Combat sport events in 2025
ONE Fight Night 33: Rodrigues vs. Persson
The poster for ONE Fight Night 33: Rodrigues vs. Persson
PromotionONE Championship
DateJuly 12, 2025 (2025-07-12)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 115: Rambong vs. Suriyanlek ONE Fight Night 33: Rodrigues vs. Persson ONE Friday Fights 116: Adam vs. Mohammed 2

ONE Fight Night 33: Rodrigues vs. Persson was a combat sports event produced by ONE Championship that took place on July 12, 2025, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1][2][3]

Background

[edit]

A ONE Women's Atomweight Muay Thai World Championship bout between current champion Allycia Rodrigues and promotional newcomer Johanna Persson headlined the event.[4]

Ilya Freymanov and undefeated promotional newcomer João Pedro Dantas were scheduled to meet in a featherweight MMA bout. However, Freymanov withdrew from the event due to personal reasons and was replaced by Ibragim Dauev.[5]

At the weigh-ins, three fighters failed to hydration test and missed weight for their respective fights:

  • Mohamed Younes Rabah weighed in at 156 pounds, 1 pounds over the featherweight limit and he was fined 30 percent of his purse which went to Shadow Singha Mawynn.
  • Macarena Aragon weighed in at 118.25 pounds, 3.25 pounds over the atomweight limit and she was fined 30 percent of her purse which went to Chihiro Sawada.
  • Cynthia Flores weighted in at 119.75 pounds, 4.75 pounds over the atomweight limit and she was fined 25 percent of her purse which went to Martyna Kierczyńska.

Results

[edit]
Fight card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai Allycia Rodrigues (c) def. Johanna Persson KO (punches) 3 0:59 [a]
Featherweight Muay Thai Shadow Singha Mawynn vs. Mohamed Younes Rabah NC (accidental eye poke) 2 0:12 [b]
Featherweight Ibragim Dauev def. João Pedro Dantas Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Muay Thai Vladimir Kuzmin def. István Ștefan Kóródi Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Women's Atomweight Chihiro Sawada def. Macarena Aragon Submission (armbar) 1 3:52 [c]
Featherweight Muay Thai Abdulla Dayakaev def. Nonthachai Jitmuangnon KO (punch) 1 0:24
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai Martyna Kierczyńska def. Cynthia Flores Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00 [d]
Bantamweight Jhanlo Mark Sangiao def. Shinechagtga Zoltsetseg Submission (rear-naked choke) 3 4:42
  1. ^ For the ONE Women's Atomweight Muay Thai World Championship.
  2. ^ Rabah missed weight (156 lb). Accidental eye poke rendered Rabah unable to continue.
  3. ^ Aragon missed weight (118.25 lb).
  4. ^ Flores missed weight (119.75 lb).

[6]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses:

  • Performance of the Night: Allycia Rodrigues and Abdulla Dayakaev
